title: oenanthe linearis subsp. linearis
intro: Oenanthe linearis subsp. linearis, also known as Water Celery or Wild Celery, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenanthe linearis subsp. linearis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
